zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt於大約1325年出生在英國越可爾梅可波洛時，他的父親Adam Wiatt41歲，母親Agnes de Colnbrook26歲。他和Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt至少有6個兒子。他去世於1385年在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特黑格享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wyatt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Wiot or Wiet. These are often pet forms of Wy, from ancient Germanic Wido (see Guy , compare Wyand 1). Wy is the usual Norman French form of the name; the Parisian French form is Guy. Wiot was also used as a diminutive of William . As a surname Wyot(t) became Wyatt during the 16th century.

in Suffolk, this is sometimes a variant of Wyard, from the Middle English personal name Wiard, which is generally from Old English Wīgheard, which is composed of the elements wīg ‘battle’ + heard ‘bold, brave’. Occasionally it may be from Old French Wiard, ancient Germanic Withard (see Viard ).

variants.name: Wyeth
meanings: English (Hampshire): perhaps a variant of   Wyatt  .
History: Nicholas Wyeth emigrated from Suffolk, England to Cambridge, MA, before 1645. John Wyeth (1770–1858) was born in Cambridge and became a prominent publisher and editor in Harrisburg, PA.

variants.name: Guy
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a common Old French personal name Guy, from ancient Germanic Wido, a short form of compound names based on the element wid(u) ‘wood, forest’, Latinized as Guido .
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, an occupational name for a guide, Old French gui (a derivative of gui(d)er ‘to guide’, of ancient Germanic origin).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

nameMeanings.name: Admiral"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Damerell
meanings: Norman: locative name from Aumale in Seine-Maritime, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt was born about 1325, in Mexborough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Adam Wiatt, was 41 and his mother, Agnes de Colnbrook, was 26. He had at least 6 sons with Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt. He died in 1385, in Haigh, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt est né environ 1325, à Mexborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam Wiatt, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Colnbrook, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt. Il est décédé en 1385, à Haigh, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyattが約1325年にイギリスヨークシュアイアメクスボロウで生まれた時，父Adam Wiattは41歳，母Agnes de Colnbrookは26歳であった。彼はLady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyattとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1385年にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターヘイグで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 요르크실르 스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Wiatt(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Colnbrook(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 하이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt родился около 1325 г. в местности мексбороую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam Wiatt было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Colnbrook, 26.
